dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Here in the Astral Plane, we are invisible to the others, but you still have the ability to subconsciously mediate in everyone's affairs and manipulate objects in the environment.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Listen in on some of the conversations between people in the neighborhood. You'll be able to sway their thoughts and responses in conversation.
